metadata.name: Submit Steel Shop Drawings for Review

description: The steel fabricator has completed their shop drawings. The project manager must submit them to the structural engineer for review and approval.

nodes.task_description: Create a new submittal package in the project management system for 'Steel Shop Drawings'.

expected_outcome.value: A new submittal package is created with a unique ID.

nodes.task_description: Attach the shop drawing files to the submittal package.

expected_outcome.value: The relevant drawing files are uploaded and attached.

nodes.task_description: Forward the submittal package to the structural engineer for review.

expected_outcome.value: The submittal is officially sent to the engineer.
